creator: fbug@merdin.com
text:
It does not look like the last two versions actually made it to packages. I see there was an update to rubygems-inspec-core again several days ago. The previous one with a fix was in August. Not sure how long it takes to make that to the packages on the mirrors, but it looks like mirrors still have version 4.24.8_1 (from before the update in ports in August). (Well, at least on the mirror I'm being directed to)

FreeBSD images44.fotki.com 12.2-RELEASE-p7 FreeBSD 12.2-RELEASE-p7 GENERIC  amd64

Please check.
